title: valeriana celtica subsp. pancicii
intro: Valeriana celtica subsp. pancicii is a subspecies of the Valerian plant, a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, known for its medicinal properties and herbal uses. This plant is valued for its sedative and calming effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The medicinal properties of Valeriana celtica subsp. pancicii include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Valerian root is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote a good night's sleep and improve mood.
